name: M.ImputedValue_BOCF
label: Baseline Observation Carried Forward
description: Uses the baseline value as the imputed value for all missing post-baseline observations within a partition. Conservative strategy assuming return to baseline.

formula.notes: The baseline value is propagated to all rows within the partition. This is a lookup, not a carry-forward — the imputed value is the same regardless of when the observation is missing.

methodInput.name: baseline_value
methodInput.description: The baseline value for the subject/parameter (typically BASE or value at ABLFL='Y')

methodInput.name: partition
methodInput.description: Grouping variables defining scope (typically subject, parameter)

assumptions: A non-missing baseline value exists for each partition
Return-to-baseline is a clinically reasonable assumption for the endpoint
